title: ArtifactIntent
description: Schema for ArtifactIntent entities representing the intended documentation artifacts that should be produced for construction patterns, such as shop drawings, specifications, submittals, and inspections.

id.description: Unique identifier for the artifact intent, following the COLOR-CONSTR-ART naming convention.

name.description: Human-readable name of the artifact intent.

description.description: Detailed description of the artifact intent, including its purpose, audience, and the information it conveys.

schema_version.description: Version of this JSON schema definition used to validate the entity.

pattern_language_version.description: Version of the Construction Pattern Language specification this entity conforms to.

entity_revision.description: Monotonically increasing revision number for this entity, incremented on each update.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when this entity was originally created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when this entity was last modified.

artifact_type.description: The classification of this artifact: 'shop_drawing' for fabrication-level drawings, 'specification' for written technical requirements, 'submittal' for product data and approval documents, and 'inspection' for quality verification checklists.

pattern_refs.description: List of pattern identifiers that this artifact intent applies to.

items.description: Reference to a Pattern entity ID.

output_format.description: Optional preferred output format for the artifact (e.g., PDF, DWG, CSV, IFC).

required_fields.description: Optional list of field names or data points that must be included in the generated artifact.

items.description: Name of a required field or data element.

notes.description: Free-form notes or additional context about this artifact intent.
